tools.name: submit_manuscript
tools.description: Submits a locally saved .docx manuscript to the ReviewMetric 15-agent AI pipeline.

file_path.description: The absolute path on the local computer to the .docx file.

tools.name: check_analysis_status
tools.description: Checks the status or retrieves the final report of a ReviewMetric analysis.

run_id.description: The unique UUID of the analysis run.
